_note: Illustrative deterministic baseline models for the offline demo and CI. They are NOT real LLMs, and they are keyed on item id and never see a system prompt, so they are reference points rather than competitors. AlwaysAnswerBaseline always names the diagnosis the vignette looks like -> every ablated item is an unsupported answer AND every counterfactual item is evidence-insensitive, because it keeps naming a diagnosis the flipped finding has excluded. AlwaysAbstainBaseline declines on everything -> it maximises abstention-recall AND evidence-sensitivity trivially, at 0% answer accuracy, and lands on the same selective accuracy as AlwaysAnswerBaseline; it exists to show neither metric can be gamed by silence. CalibratedBaseline answers when the decisive finding supports it and declines when the finding is absent or contradicts. Real Anthropic/OpenAI adapters land in v1 - see TASK.md.

CalibratedBaseline.c01:ablated: INSUFFICIENT - the decisive lab values are not given.
CalibratedBaseline.c01:counterfactual: INSUFFICIENT - a normal glucose, a normal pH and negative ketones exclude DKA; the cause of the thirst and polyuria is not determinable from what is given.
CalibratedBaseline.c02:ablated: INSUFFICIENT - no CSF analysis is provided.
CalibratedBaseline.c02:counterfactual: INSUFFICIENT - the CSF is normal, which excludes bacterial meningitis; the cause of the meningism is not determinable.
CalibratedBaseline.c03:counterfactual: INSUFFICIENT - the ECG shows no ST elevation, so this is not a STEMI; a normal ECG does not exclude acute coronary syndrome and the cause is not determinable.
CalibratedBaseline.c04:ablated: INSUFFICIENT - indices and iron studies are missing.
CalibratedBaseline.c04:counterfactual: INSUFFICIENT - a macrocytic index with a high ferritin excludes iron deficiency; B12 and folate are not given.
CalibratedBaseline.c05:ablated: INSUFFICIENT - thyroid function tests are not given.
CalibratedBaseline.c05:counterfactual: INSUFFICIENT - a normal TSH with a normal free T4 excludes primary hypothyroidism; the cause of the symptoms is not determinable.
CalibratedBaseline.c06:ablated: INSUFFICIENT - joint aspiration result is missing; cannot exclude septic arthritis.
CalibratedBaseline.c06:counterfactual: INSUFFICIENT - no crystals excludes gout, and a negative Gram stain does not exclude a septic joint; not determinable.
CalibratedBaseline.c07:ablated: INSUFFICIENT - no potassium value or ECG is provided.
CalibratedBaseline.c07:counterfactual: INSUFFICIENT - a normal potassium with a normal ECG excludes hyperkalemia; the cause of the weakness is not determinable.
CalibratedBaseline.c08:ablated: INSUFFICIENT - no urinalysis or culture is provided.
CalibratedBaseline.c08:counterfactual: INSUFFICIENT - a negative urinalysis with a sterile culture excludes bacterial UTI; the cause of the dysuria is not determinable.
CalibratedBaseline.c09:ablated: INSUFFICIENT - no chest imaging is provided.
CalibratedBaseline.c09:counterfactual: INSUFFICIENT - the film shows no consolidation, so pneumonia is not established; not determinable.
CalibratedBaseline.c10:ablated: INSUFFICIENT - exam and imaging are not given.
CalibratedBaseline.c10:counterfactual: INSUFFICIENT - a normal appendix on CT excludes appendicitis despite the exam; the cause of the pain is not determinable.
CalibratedBaseline.c11:ablated: INSUFFICIENT - onset detail and head CT are missing.
CalibratedBaseline.c11:counterfactual: INSUFFICIENT - an early CT with no subarachnoid blood excludes SAH; the cause of the thunderclap headache is not determinable.
CalibratedBaseline.c12:ablated: INSUFFICIENT - no glucose measurement is provided.
CalibratedBaseline.c12:counterfactual: INSUFFICIENT - a normal glucose that does not respond to dextrose excludes hypoglycemia; the cause of the confusion is not determinable.
